title: Infosys Science Foundation Honors Infosys Prize 2025 Laureates
detailed_summary: Infosys Science Foundation awarded the Infosys Prize 2025 to six researchers across Economics, Engineering and Computer Science, Humanities and Social Sciences, Life Sciences, Mathematical Sciences, and Physical Sciences. Each winner received a pure gold medal, citation, and prize purse of USD 100,000. The announcement is primarily philanthropic and awards-related, with no disclosed material impact on Infosys’s business, financial performance, strategy, or governance.

key_facts.fact: The Infosys Science Foundation awarded the winners of the Infosys Prize 2025 at a felicitation ceremony in Bengaluru.
key_facts.section_heading: PRESS RELEASE Infosys Science Foundation Honors Outstanding Researchers with the Infosys Prize 2025

key_facts.fact: The prize recognized researchers under the age of 40 across six categories: Economics, Engineering and Computer Science, Humanities and Social Sciences, Life Sciences, Mathematical Sciences, and Physical Sciences.
key_facts.section_heading: PRESS RELEASE Infosys Science Foundation Honors Outstanding Researchers with the Infosys Prize 2025

key_facts.fact: Each winner was conferred a pure gold medal, a citation, and a prize purse of USD 100,000.
